name: Avocado Pate with Pecans
recipeIngredient: 4 Butter lettuce or Boston lettuce leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 6-cup rectangular glass loaf pan or ceramic dish with 3 layers of waxed paper, extending over the long sides only.
2. Brush the top sheet of waxed paper generously with vegetable oil.
3. Puree avocados and cream cheese in a food processor.
4. Add shallots, lemon juice, garlic, chili powder, and salt; blend for 30 seconds.
5. Transfer the mixture to the prepared pan and smooth the top.
6. Press plastic wrap onto the surface of the pate and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
7. Remove the plastic and unmold the pate onto a platter lined with lettuce leaves.
8. Mix parsley and pecans, then sprinkle over the pate.
9. Garnish with olives and tomatoes.
10. Surround with tortilla chips.
